side_effects.description: Blacked out for approximately 20 seconds after injection, regained consciousness within 1 minute and felt completely fine
Needle was harder to break through skin than usual, injection hurt more than normal, bleeding occurred after needle removal

protocol_notes: Week 4 of Retatrutide cycle, dose increased by 0.5mg. Likely vasovagal syncope triggered by combination of difficult needle insertion, sight of blood, and anxiety. User reports this was their 4th week and had been fine with needles previously.
